description: Dependency DAG for additional harness scopes needed to support staged rollout of the Codex App Server control plane.

nodes.label: Baseline Runtime Probe
nodes.description: Installed-runtime probe with six baseline scenario packs and checked-in artifacts.

nodes.label: Runtime State Isolation
nodes.description: Run the probe against a harness-owned HOME/XDG or equivalent state root so results are reproducible and non-ambient.

nodes.label: Live Approval Roundtrip
nodes.description: Exercise a real server-initiated approval and/or request_user_input flow end to end.

nodes.label: Live Collaboration Roundtrip
nodes.description: Upgrade collaboration from discovery to a controlled live multi-agent roundtrip in the standalone harness.

nodes.label: Python App Server Client Lane
nodes.description: Refactor the runtime probe into a reusable Python client lane rather than a single-purpose executable.

nodes.label: TypeScript App Server Client Lane
nodes.description: Add a TypeScript App Server client lane using the protocol surface and typed request/notification handling.

nodes.label: TypeScript Codex SDK Smoke
nodes.description: Add a narrow smoke lane for the TypeScript Codex SDK so workspace-execution semantics can be compared against App Server.

nodes.label: Remote Surface Observation
nodes.description: Capture desktop, web, and cloud deltas as projections over the native control plane rather than as separate authorities.

nodes.label: Source Lane Comparison
nodes.description: Point the harness at repo-built codex-rs targets so installed-runtime behavior can be compared with source builds.

nodes.label: Release Regression Pack
nodes.description: Bundle runtime, source, approval, and collaboration checks into a release-facing regression surface.
